rationale: Bot review summary; no actionable request beyond the inline redaction comment tracked separately.
Refined sensitive value redaction to stop at common delimiters and include passwd, with regression coverage for preserving adjacent non-sensitive fields.
Bot review wrapper text; actionable Codex findings are tracked by their inline review comment IDs.
Returned audit metadata is now passed through recursive redaction, with regression coverage for secret-like verification failure reasons.
Deployment execution exceptions now force finalStatus to FAILED even after verification had set a success status, with regression coverage for post-verification evidence failures.
